name: BUS TZ PAWA — Payment Callback & Ticket Delivery

parameters.query:
WITH upd AS (
  UPDATE bookings SET status = 'CONFIRMED', paid_at = NOW(), payment_provider_ref = $2
  WHERE ref = $1 AND status = 'HELD'
  RETURNING id, seat_id, passenger_name, phone, trip_id, amount
),
seat_upd AS (
  UPDATE seats SET status = 'CONFIRMED' WHERE id = (SELECT seat_id FROM upd) RETURNING id
),
pay AS (
  INSERT INTO payments (booking_ref, provider, txn_ref, amount, status, raw_callback)
  VALUES ($1, $3, $2, $4, 'SUCCESS', $5::jsonb)
  ON CONFLICT (txn_ref) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT b.ref, b.passenger_name, b.phone, b.amount, t.departure_at, r.origin, r.destination, s.seat_number, bs.plate, bs.class
FROM upd u
JOIN bookings b ON b.id = u.id
JOIN trips t ON t.id = b.trip_id
JOIN routes r ON r.id = t.route_id
JOIN seats s ON s.id = b.seat_id
LEFT JOIN buses bs ON bs.id = t.bus_id;

INSERT INTO payments (booking_ref, provider, txn_ref, amount, status, raw_callback)
VALUES ($1, $3, $2, $4, 'INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS', $5::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (txn_ref) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO payments (booking_ref, provider, txn_ref, amount, status, raw_callback)
VALUES ($1, $3, $2, $4, 'FAILED', $5::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (txn_ref) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;
